start.text: I can't let you do that...
start.name: Employee

NotAllowed.text: Yo- you ca- can't turn th- the power off. He d-doesn't want you t-to.

HereToHelp.text: H-help? I can't h-help you. You can't t-turn t-the power off. You can't the power off. You can't turn the power off. YOU CAN'T TURN THE POWER OFF...

UpToSomething.text: U-up to s-something? I'm not u-up t-to anything! You can't t-turn t-the power off. You can't the power off. You can't turn the power off. YOU CAN'T TURN THE POWER OFF...

sorry.text: I'm sorry it had to end like this. I've been lost for too long. This is not me. This is not me. This is not me. This is not me.

NewBrain.text: Stand still, this will only take a minute. The NewBrain will make you perfect. You'll forget all about the environment. You'll forget all about the bad. You'll forget that this ever happened...
